name: context7-integration
description:
Use when integrating Context7 (knowledge/context store) for document ingestion,
semantic search, or scoped context retrieval.
Triggers for: uploading documents, searching knowledge base, filtering by role/tenant,
or providing AI with document-grounded context.
NOT for: general database queries, file storage without context semantics, or non-document content.
capabilities: Ingest single or batch documents into Context7 knowledge store
Perform semantic search with role and tenant filtering
Shape and format retrieved context for AI prompts
Implement multi-tenancy with school_id namespace isolation
Build FastAPI endpoints for knowledge management
Create React hooks for frontend search functionality
author: Awais68
securitySummary: This is a legitimate documentation/reference skill for Context7 knowledge store integration. All 101 static findings are false positives caused by the scanner misidentifying benign code patterns. The skill contains standard Python regex for YAML parsing (misidentified as weak crypto), file operations for documentation ingestion (misidentified as reconnaissance), and environment variable access for API credentials (misidentified as secret keys). The 'dangerous combination' heuristic is a false alarm—the skill is designed for authorized API access with proper credential management.
valueStatement: Building AI-powered applications requires grounded context from documents. This skill provides ready-to-use code for integrating Context7 knowledge store with document ingestion, semantic search, and role-based access control for ERP systems.
limitations: Requires running Context7 service instance and API credentials
Does not include PDF text extraction (requires PyPDF2 dependency)
Semantic search quality depends on document chunking strategy
Token limits must be managed for large context responses

useCases.title: Build Knowledge APIs
useCases.description: Create FastAPI endpoints for document ingestion and semantic search with role-based access control.

useCases.title: Add Search UI
useCases.description: Implement React search hooks and components for knowledge base queries with context display.

useCases.title: Ground AI Responses
useCases.description: Provide document-grounded context to AI models using shaped context formatting and token limits.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Document Ingest
promptTemplates.scenario: Upload a document to knowledge base
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the Context7 client to ingest a document with title, module, category, and role-based permissions. The document is stored at docs/policies/attendance-policy.md

promptTemplates.title: Search with Filters
promptTemplates.scenario: Search knowledge base with tenant isolation
promptTemplates.prompt: Search the Context7 knowledge base for information about fee refunds. Filter by school_id and user role. Return top 5 relevant chunks with similarity above 0.7.

promptTemplates.title: Batch Ingestion
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a batch ingestion script to upload all markdown files from docs/faq/ directory to Context7. Each file should have module=faq and category=faq.

promptTemplates.title: Context Shaping
promptTemplates.prompt: Use ContextShaper to format search results into prompt-safe format. Include source citations, limit to 4000 tokens, and truncate at paragraph boundaries.

bestPractices: Always validate documents for PII before ingestion to prevent data leaks
Use namespace isolation and school_id filtering for multi-tenant ERP systems
Set appropriate max_chunks and min_similarity thresholds to control result quality
antiPatterns: Ingesting sensitive documents without access control metadata
Returning full document content without similarity scoring or source attribution
Bypassing role-based filters when querying knowledge base

faq.question: What is Context7 and how does it work?
faq.answer: Context7 is a knowledge store for document ingestion and semantic search. It chunks documents and enables retrieval-augmented generation with role-based access control.

faq.question: Does this skill work with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill provides code patterns compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. Integration follows standard MCP patterns for tool usage.

faq.question: How do I set up the Context7 API credentials?
faq.answer: Set CONTEXT7_API_KEY and CONTEXT7_API_URL environment variables. The client uses these for authenticated requests to your Context7 instance.

faq.question: Is my data safe when ingesting documents?
faq.answer: Data safety depends on your deployment. The skill includes role-based access controls and multi-tenancy support. Review documents for PII before ingestion.

faq.question: What document formats are supported?
faq.answer: Markdown, HTML, and plain text are natively supported. PDF extraction requires PyPDF2 library. The skill handles file type detection by extension.

faq.question: How does this compare to vector databases like Pinecone?
faq.answer: Context7 provides knowledge-specific features like role-based access, document metadata filtering, and context shaping utilities out of the box.
